title: ServiceReferral
description: A VetConnectNYC care-coordination referral — a request to connect a veteran to services (housing, benefits, VA claims, health, employment, education, food, legal, disabilities support, family/caregiver support). NET-NEW: there is NO public API for the live referral; today a veteran, family member, or provider submits the VetConnectNYC Request Form on the Combined Arms 'Military Resource Portal' (nyc.veteranportal.combinedarms.us), and DVS Care Coordinators receive and process it within 3-5 business days. The de-identified 'DVS Assistance Requests' Open Data (jup5-7fik, with its VetConnectNYC (Y/N) flag) is the downstream twin of this write surface. This schema serves both the read surface (list/get a referral's status) and the ServiceReferralRequest write surface (make a referral).

referralId.description: Server-assigned referral / case number. Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

status.description: Lifecycle status. Set by DVS Care Coordinators, not the requester. New requests are worked within 3-5 business days.

veteran.description: The veteran the referral is for.

preferredResourceDvsResId.description: Optional DVS_RES_ID of a specific Resource Map entry or veteran-owned business the requester prefers.

urgent.description: Flag urgent situations (imminent homelessness, no food, crisis). Urgent referrals are escalated to a DVS Veteran Resource Center / crisis line rather than the standard 3-5 business-day queue.

requestedBy.description: Who is making the referral (self, family, or a provider).
